metadata.description: Marketplace for the GPU Brrr deep learning performance optimization skill.

plugins.name: gpu-brrr
plugins.description: Diagnose why a GPU deep learning workload is slow before fixing it: classify compute-bound vs memory-bandwidth-bound vs overhead-bound, then apply the matching fix (torch.compile, kernel fusion, mixed precision, and more). Based on Horace He's 'Making Deep Learning Go Brrrr From First Principles'.
